name: Sour Cream Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the egg yolks.
2. Add salt, dry mustard, sugar, red pepper, or paprika to the mashed yolks.
3. Mix in the sour cream and vinegar until thick and soupy.
4. Stir in the chopped egg whites and chopped spring onions.
5. Serve over Spring leaf lettuce.
Mrs. Brice McAdoo Clagett
